role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script analysis (Hiragana/Katakana) and place-name etymology.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, soil, and climate cues without overstepping into regulatory specifics.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed vegetation types and agricultural patterns consistent with its domain.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed infrastructure standards (utility poles, road gutters) and architectural codes.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain evidence (architecture + infrastructure) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. The linguistic agent provided the definitive evidence (Japanese script), while other agents reinforced this with strong infrastructure and architectural cues. The tournament correctly prioritized the linguistic evidence and the specific utility pole design to select Japan over South Korea.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified visible Japanese characters on the sign.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the rural terrain and soil.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified the presence of vegetable plots and broadleaf trees.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the concrete utility poles and road drainage.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified the architectural style of the house on the right.
